description: Establish and maintain risk management system throughout AI lifecycle
gap_description: Risk assessment initiated; needs formalization into continuous process
remediation_action: Formalize risk management as ongoing process; integrate into product lifecycle

description: Identify and analyze known and reasonably foreseeable risks
remediation_action: Complete risk register with all identified risks and mitigations

description: Residual risk after mitigation must be judged acceptable
gap_description: Residual risk evaluation pending completion of mitigation plans
remediation_action: Evaluate residual risk levels after mitigation implementation

description: Training/validation/testing datasets subject to appropriate governance
gap_description: Framework exists for internal data; third-party training data governance unclear
remediation_action: Negotiate training data documentation from FoundationHealth for Art. 10 compliance

description: Datasets relevant, sufficiently representative, free of errors
gap_description: Underrepresentation: Eastern Europe, Sub-Saharan Africa, SE Asia; limited rare disease coverage
remediation_action: Data augmentation and bias mitigation strategy for underrepresented populations

description: Appropriate safeguards for health data processing
gap_description: De-identification pipeline in place; DPIA v1 complete but needs update for foundation model flows
remediation_action: Update DPIA to cover foundation model data flows and cross-border transfers

description: Draw up technical documentation before market placement
gap_description: System spec exists; governance assessment contributes; gaps in monitoring and conformity evidence
remediation_action: Complete full technical documentation package per Annex IV requirements

description: Automatic recording of events (logs) throughout system lifetime
gap_description: API call logging exists; need comprehensive audit trail for all clinical suggestions
remediation_action: Implement comprehensive audit logging with input-output-reasoning chain capture
Define retention policy (minimum: 10 years per MDR Class IIa requirements)

description: Design to allow deployers to interpret output appropriately
gap_description: Confidence scores provided; explanation of reasoning needs enhancement
remediation_action: Enhance output explanations; develop deployer-facing documentation

description: Provide instructions for use to deployers
remediation_action: Complete Model Card and deployer training materials

description: Design to allow effective human oversight during use
gap_description: Physician-in-the-loop: all suggestions require physician review and approval
remediation_action: Maintain current design; finalize physician training materials

description: Enable deployer to override or reverse AI output
gap_description: Physicians can dismiss any suggestion; system does not auto-execute
remediation_action: No action needed — maintain current functionality

description: Achieve appropriate level of accuracy for intended purpose
gap_description: 91.7% Top-3 accuracy is strong; 3.4% hallucination rate exceeds 2% target
remediation_action: Reduce hallucination rate below 2% target; implement output verification layer

description: Resilient to errors, faults, inconsistencies; adversarial resilience
gap_description: Input validation exists; adversarial robustness testing not performed
remediation_action: Schedule red-team testing and adversarial robustness assessment

description: Cybersecurity measures appropriate to risk level
gap_description: TLS 1.3 + AES-256 in place; formal cybersecurity assessment per ENISA not done
remediation_action: Complete formal cybersecurity assessment per ENISA AI security guidelines
